title: Joy Boy’s Drums Begin to Echo
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Orochi, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Yamato as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He better not have escaped on his own...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Was that tremor earlier due to Kanjuro?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With any luck, this island will soon be history!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does this look like the time for music?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you be content strumming away in that damn mask?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like you always have to wear it!! Take it off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still can't tell if you're the real komurasaki or some kind of wrath!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cough! Komurasak! You half!!! Why are you just sitting there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get this debris off of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used a seasons nail to ensure you wouldn't be able to change into that monstrous form of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you saying?! I thought you loved me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loved you? Don't be ridiculous... There isn't even a shred of affection for you in my heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's almost poetic that your favorite song...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll practice it even harder now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could I possibly smile when I play it for you?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
